name: california-ventura
description: Ventura County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Ventura County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Ventura County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Ventura County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Ventura County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Ventura County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-ventura-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-ventura-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
Supervisor records are contained within 'li' elements with class 'elementor-icon-list-item' inside the 'ul.elementor-icon-list-items' container.
Each supervisor's detail URL is the 'href' attribute of the parent 'a' tag wrapping the list item.
The supervisor's name and district are combined in the text content of the 'span.elementor-icon-list-text' child of the 'a' tag.
The photo URL is found in the 'src' attribute of the 'img' element nested inside the same 'a' tag as the text.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Ventura County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Ventura County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Ventura County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Ventura County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
